creator: me@niklaas.eu
text:
Probably this is also relevant for Bug 208109 and Bug 188181. I continued working on this a bit after the port had been abandoned. I made the following changes to the port: http://sprunge.us/XWPe . I have no clue of C++. I tried to prevent errors by continuing and re-using the patterns of substitution in the Makefile. I end up with this: http://sprunge.us/TCWI , which I don't know how to solve.

Any help is very much appreciated.
